content.en:
"It turns out that the mystery of the ultimate secret method is like this!"

Ye Tian gradually understood some of the ultimate secret method by contemplating this incomplete ultimate secret method star.

It's not so easy to really create a complete ultimate secret method.

However, his Divine Dimension talent is eighteen-star, so his qualifications in the Divine Dimension have ~ reached the highest level.

Therefore, the difficulty of his self-created Ultimate Polarization Secret Method will be much reduced.

However, before he could study it for long, an Ultimate Powerhouse came to the door - here.

But it is not the master of Dongxi Mountain, but another ultimate powerhouse.

"Brother Ye, I'm Bing Xuan from the Nine Extremes Capital. "

Bingxuan introduced himself.

The capital of the Nine Extremes, Bingxuan.

Ye Tian had some understanding of this force, although it was not the Twelve Heavens Sect, it was one of the top forces under the Twelve Heavens Sect, with five Ultimate Powerhouses.

"What is the matter with Brother Bingxuan coming to me?"

Ye Tian asked.

"That's a good thing!" Bing Xuan smiled: "I found a special ruin, which requires a strong person from the eighteenth dimension to enter, I have looked for several eighteen-dimensional before, but they have all fallen." Brother Ye has a combat power comparable to that of an Ultimate Extreme powerhouse, and he can definitely get a chance from that special relic. "

"You want me to risk taking out the treasure inside for you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's a shared opportunity!" Bing Xuan said: "The benefits obtained in it, we will share it equally, how about it?"

"Not good!" Ye Tian shook his head, "I need to risk my life, and you just give me an address, it's not fair to me." "

"How about I come up with another incomplete Ultimate Secret Method?" Bing Xuan asked.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Although this trip was a bit risky, the price given by Bing Xuan was very good, and a piece of the Incomplete Ultimate Secret Method was already very precious, and coupled with the opportunity in that ruin, there was no reason why he should not agree.

Immediately.

Ye Tian inquired about the ruins.

Bing Xuan said: "That ruin is actually a relic left by a certain Ultimate Lord, who fell in the Dimensional Sea, so there is no problem exploring his ruins. It's just that there is a treasure from the Sea of Dimensions in that ruin, which makes the ruins have a special change, and the ultimate powerhouse is not allowed to enter. Therefore, I can only let the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse in. "

"What is the main danger?" Ye Tian had to ask this question clearly.

"It's a special creature - a golden worm!"

"This creature was found by the Ultimate Lord in the Sea of Dimensions, and then brought back to study, and it produced a certain mutation, making the body of this golden worm extremely strong, and it was difficult for the eighteen dimensions to break its defenses. And after the death of the ultimate lord, the golden worm multiplied in that ruin, but it didn't dare to come out, otherwise it wouldn't be able to exert much strength under the suppression of our god dimension heaven and earth. Bingxuan introduced.

"I see!"

Ye Tian had a general understanding of the situation.

Subsequently.

So they went to the ruins of the ultimate lord.

And according to what Bing Xuan said, this ultimate lord is not the ultimate lord of the Twelve Heavens Sect, and there are also some ultimate powerhouses in the sea of dimensions, although nine out of nine of the ultimate powerhouses will fall in the sea of dimensions, but there are also extremely rare powerhouses who have found an opportunity to break through in the sea of dimensions for the ultimate powerhouses.

And the ultimate lord is one of them, but unfortunately he has no background and eventually falls.

This ruin was not in the Divine Dimension Domain, Ye Tian followed Bing Xuan through multiple realms, and finally came to the Northern Wilderness Domain.

It's a very remote area, and there's nothing powerful here.

It's hard to imagine that one of the ruins of the Ultimate Lord is here.

Northern Wilderness, Polar Ice Field.

Deep underground.

There is a Divine Dimensional Rift here, and inside the Divine Dimensional Rift is a relic of the Ultimate Lord.

Ye Tian and that Bing Xuan walked into this Divine Dimensional Rift, but Bing Xuan could only enter the edge of the inner Divine Dimension Rift, and could not enter the inside of the ruins.

"Brother Ye, there are ruins ahead, you should be careful. "

Bing Xuan reminded.

"Good!"

Ye Tian went directly into this ruin.

"It's a gold bug!"

Ye Tian noticed.

Whoa!!!

A large number of golden worms emerged, each of which was comparable to the weaker eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses, and some of them were even comparable to the top eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses.

And there are so many of them, no wonder those eighteen-dimensional people have died.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian went all out, and every move and every style killed a golden insect.

One by one, the golden worms were killed by him, and he continued to move forward, causing the golden worms to die one by one.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian is already very tired, but the golden worms have all died.

There may be a few golden bugs hidden in the depths of the ruins, but at least they dare not appear.

Instead of moving forward immediately, he swallowed some resources to regain his strength.

After a while, the physical strength was restored, the physical strength was restored, and the mental strength was also restored, and then the move on.

He opened one building after another, and there were some good things left here, but none of them were of much value.

Soon.

He found a huge gray stone tablet, and looking at this stone tablet, he felt that his thinking had accelerated a lot, and it seemed that it had become much easier to create his own ultimate secret method.

"This stone tablet is extraordinary, it should be the treasure that the Ultimate Lord found in the Sea of Dimensions!" Ye Tian guessed.

He put away the stele and prepared to discuss it with the Ultimate Powerhouse and give it to him.

He felt that if this stone tablet was taken out, its value would be absolutely extraordinary, and it might also help him comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension.

After that, he continued to search for various treasures.

Deep in the ruins.

He saw the residence of the Ultimate Lord, and found three inheritances here, one inheritance about the Ultimate Strongman's breakthrough to the Ultimate Lord, and one inheritance was the Ultimate Secret Method, and it was also a relatively complete Ultimate Secret Method.

The third inheritance is an ultimate dimensional killer.

"This Ultimate Lord has actually left three inheritances. "

However, if you want to obtain the three inheritances that remain, you must make a divine oath and avenge him, otherwise your body will collapse and die in the future.

In addition to these three inheritances, Ye Tian also found a weapon, which was a spear, which was very extraordinary.

"It's the ultimate weapon!"

Ye Tian recognized it, this kind of weapon can only burst out in the sea of dimensions, and it is really buried in the divine dimension heaven and earth, and it cannot exert its effect.
